discussion_comments.comment_body: **issue**: I'm going to channel my inner @sidharthv96, but please don't add spaces between imports unless you have to! It messed with auto-import formatting tools, since they assume that you're purposely adding spaces to group imports.

commented_code:
svgPath = select(svgPathNode)
       .select('path')
       .attr('id', edge.id)
-      .attr('class', ' ' + strokeClasses + (edge.classes ? ' ' + edge.classes : ''))
+      .attr(
+        'class',
+        ' ' + strokeClasses + (edge.classes ? ' ' + edge.classes : '') + (animationClass ?? '')
+      )

discussion_comments.comment_body: This will require more code changes. Rather have separate PR for this.
Please use backticked strings like above, so it's more readable.
Let's avoid using [Magic numbers](https://stackoverflow.com/questions/47882/what-are-magic-numbers-and-why-do-some-consider-them-bad) in new commits.
Use template string instead of concatenation.

I removed this change because it was related to another feature (turning the tags).
I will probably open another PR for that.

discussion_comments.comment_body:
These formatting changes should be reverted. These could have been tests cases to check inconsistent spacing. 

So please revert changes to existing test, and add new standalone cases for until.
